data.title: Multi Ways Holdings closed second tranche of $1.485M Registered Direct Offering with 9M shares and warrants.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Multi Ways Holdings Limited, a top supplier of heavy construction equipment in Singapore and nearby areas, completed the second phase of a registered direct offering. This offering involved 9,000,000 ordinary shares valued at $0.00025 per share, along with warrants for the purchase of an additional 9,000,000 ordinary shares. Multi Ways is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol MWG.

data.title: Medalist Diversified REIT declares $0.0675 dividend per share on Common Stock; specializes in SE US.
data.description: Based in Richmond, Virginia, Medalist Diversified REIT (NASDAQ: MDRR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.0675 per share for its common stock. The real estate investment trust focuses on acquiring, owning, and managing commercial real estate in the Southeast U.S. The Board of Directors approved this dividend payment, which will be distributed to shareholders in cash.

data.title: Datavault AI receives $150M BTC investment from Scilex Holding Company for over 278M shares, priced at $0.5378 each.
data.description: Datavault AI Inc., a prominent company in AI-powered data visualization and monetization, has closed the first part of its $150 million Bitcoin investment deal with Scilex Holding Company. As per the agreement, Scilex is set to obtain around 278,914,094 shares of Datavault common stock at a price of $0.5378 per share. This investment further solidifies Datavault's position in the market and demonstrates the confidence Scilex has in the company's future prospects and technological capabilities.

data.title: Coherent introduces industry's first 100G ZR QSFP28 for bi-directional applications, enabling 10x capacity on existing networks.
data.description: The first 100G ZR solution with dual lasers for QSFP28 has been introduced to the industry. This new technology allows broadband providers to optimize capacity on current fiber infrastructure efficiently. It is a significant advancement in the industry, as it enables providers to maximize their existing resources and enhance broadband services. This innovation is poised to revolutionize the industry by boosting network capabilities while utilizing the same infrastructure.
IRANIAN FOREIGN MINISTER ARAQCHI: THE US HAS BETRAYED DIPLOMACY, BUT E3 HAS ‘BURIED IT’

data.title: SOS Limited semi-annual financial results show revenue of $89.6 million, up 48.1% from previous period. Focus on commodities trading led to increased sales of natural rubber, driving revenue growth. Mining operations shut down to reallocate resources. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: SOS Limited reported its semi-annual financial results for the six months ended June 30, 2025. The company's total revenue for this period was $89.6 million, up 48.1% from the previous year. The revenue breakdown shows that Commodities Trading contributed 94.9%, Hosting Services 4.3%, and Others 0.8%. The increase in revenue was attributed to higher sales of natural rubber, driven by the ongoing recovery of the Chinese economy. The company decided to shut down internal Bitcoin mining operations to focus on expanding third-party mining hosting services. Operating costs increased, resulting in a gross profit ratio of -1.5%, compared to 4% in the previous year. For more details, visit SOS's website or contact their Investor Relations Department.

data.title: Ninepoint Partners' 2025 Short Duration Flow-Through LP sells out, raising $24.99 million with 999,927 Units at $25 each.
data.description: Ninepoint Partners LP recently disclosed the successful completion of the initial and concluding closing for the Ninepoint 2025 Short Duration Flow-Through Limited Partnership. This involved offering Class A and Class F limited partnership units, issuing a total of 999,927 Units and generating $24,998,175 in aggregate gross proceeds. Each Unit was priced at $25.00, with a minimum subscription requirement of 100 Units ($2,500).

data.title: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. will release Q3 earnings on Oct 15, 2025, and hold a conference call on Oct 16 at 2:00 pm CT.
data.description: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Great Southern Bank, is set to release their third-quarter preliminary earnings data on October 15, 2025, following market closure. This will be accompanied by a conference call on October 16, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. CT (3:00 p.m. ET). The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GSBC.

data.title: Silynxcom announces H1 2025 financial results, $2.9M raised, diversified client base, future growth in tactical comms.
data.description: Silynxcom Ltd., a leading manufacturer of tactical communication headsets, announced its financial results for the six months ending June 30, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE American as SYNX, emphasized its success in expanding its customer base globally. With a recent capital raise of $2.9 million, Silynxcom has bolstered its financial standing, paving the way for growth in the tactical communications industry. This progress reflects the company's commitment to diversification and market expansion.

data.title: Coherent introduces new Multi-Rail tech for optical transport with improved efficiency, scale, and speed.
data.description: In Saxonburg, Pennsylvania on September 26, 2025, Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR), a renowned player in photonics worldwide, unveiled significant enhancements to its Multi-Rail technology platform. These upgrades promise enhanced efficiency, scalability, and speed for the forthcoming phase of optical transport networks.

data.title: Palisade Bio's special stockholders meeting adjourned due to lack of quorum on Sept 26, 2025 at 10:00 am Pacific Time.
data.description: In Carlsbad, California, on September 26, 2025, Palisade Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: PALI) disclosed that their special stockholders meeting at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time was both convened and adjourned on the same day. The meeting did not conduct any business as the necessary quorum was not met. Palisade Bio focuses on developing innovative treatments for individuals with autoimmune, inflammatory, and fibrotic conditions.

data.title: Oculis executive conducts trades under 10b5-1 plan per notification. Compliance with Act of 1934.
data.description: ZUG, Switzerland - On September 26, 2025, it was revealed that a Person Discharging Managerial Responsibilities of the Company engaged in trades as per a 10b5-1 trading plan. This action was taken in line with Rule 10b5-1(c)(1) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

data.title: Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) will hold third quarter 2025 earnings conference call on October 28, 9:00 am Eastern time.
data.description: Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) from Clayton, Missouri, disclosed that their senior management will conduct a review of the company's financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, October 28, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. The review will include prepared remarks, with a focus on key financial numbers and market insights.

data.title: Honeywell will increase annual cash dividend from $4.52 to $4.76 per share, effective Q4 2025. #dividendincrease
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on September 26, 2025, Honeywell disclosed an update that its Board of Directors sanctioned a rise in the normal yearly cash dividend of the company from $4.52 to $4.76 per share. The augmented dividend will come into effect commencing the fourth quarter. Honeywell, listed as HON on NASDAQ, made this significant announcement today.

data.title: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) schedules conference call to review 2025 third quarter earnings on October 13 at 9:00 a.m. central time.
data.description: Winona, Minnesota - Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) disclosed details regarding its upcoming conference call to discuss the third-quarter results for 2025 and provide an update on existing operations. The call is scheduled to take place on Monday, October 13, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. For those interested in participating, the live broadcast of the conference call will be accessible on the internet via the link: https://investor.fastenal.com/events.cfm. The presentation for the conference call, which will include important information, can be found at the provided web address.

data.title: AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AFB) reports Q3 earnings, with total net assets as of July 31, 2025.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: AFB), a closed-end investment company, revealed its financial results for the third quarter of the fiscal year ending July 31, 2025. As of July 31, 2025, the Fund reported total net assets amounting to a specific figure.

data.title: Expedition Infrastructure Partners and Gordian Group join forces, combining $20+ billion in renewable deals & 35 years of expertise.
data.description: A strategic partnership was revealed today between Expedition Infrastructure Partners (XIP) and Gordian Group. This collaboration brings together over $20 billion in renewable transactions along with 35 years of restructuring expertise. Based in New York, the newly formed alliance aims to offer comprehensive restructuring services to clients in need.

data.title: Glucose Health, Inc. (OTC: GLUC) CEO and CFO resign, effective Sept 30, 2025, for personal reasons.
data.description: In Bentonville, Arkansas, on September 26, 2025, Glucose Health, Inc. (OTC: GLUC) made public the resignation of its Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer, effective September 30, 2025, citing personal reasons for their departure. The company clarified that the resignation was voluntary and not initiated by them.

data.title: Energy Income Fund offers annual redemption for up to 281,167 units for unitholders. TSX – ENI.UN.
data.description: In Toronto on September 26, 2025, the Energy Income Fund (TSX – ENI.UN) shared exciting news that unitholders can redeem a maximum of 281,167 units of the Fund.
CDT Environmental Technology reveals outcomes of its Special Assembly; key decisions reviewed.
